page_metadata.biotools__summary: lab.js is a free, open, online study builder for the behavioral and cognitive sciences, which also works in lab. lab.js makes building in-browser experiments easy. It’s a simple, graphical tool to help you build studies for the web and the laboratory.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: lab.js is a free, open, online study builder for the behavioral and cognitive sciences, which also works in lab. lab.js makes building in-browser experiments easy. It’s a simple, graphical tool to help you build studies for the web and the laboratory.
